title: Black Chapel Ledger
hook: A cathedral ledger records debts paid in memory instead of money.

villain.worldview: Every truth must be paid for, and mercy is fraud.
villain.motive: Force players to choose who deserves absolution.

arcs.title: Discovery & Curiosity
arcs.summary: Validate the first anomaly, establish trust baselines, and seed investigative obsession.

arcs.title: Escalation & Unease
arcs.summary: Push contradictions, introduce manipulative pressure, and degrade certainty.

arcs.title: Danger & Direct Involvement
arcs.summary: Force personal risk, urgent tradeoffs, and irreversible consequences.

arcs.title: Resolution or Psychological Break
arcs.summary: Collapse competing truths into final judgement, compromise, or breakdown.

beats.title: Discovery & Curiosity - Day 01
beats.narrative: An intake anomaly lands across multiple channels before dawn.

incomingMessages.text: Operator, before you move: chain-of-custody on today's drop is unstable. Confirm Burned vellum fragment and tell me if your last call still stands (none).
I heard my own words on a line I never called. If you still trust your trusted contact, do not forward this to the wrong desk.
Off-record: I can publish tonight, but your previous choice is already circulating. I need one verification point tied to Burned vellum fragment.

endings.title: Documented Justice
endings.summary: Evidence chain survives scrutiny and responsible parties are exposed.
endings.epilogue: The investigation closes publicly, but residual files imply a wider network.
endings.sequelHook: A new sealed case number appears in your inbox at 03:11.

endings.title: Pyrrhic Containment
endings.summary: The immediate threat is contained, but key truths remain buried.
endings.epilogue: Witnesses are safe for now, yet official records are permanently altered.
endings.sequelHook: Unknown Contact sends a checksum that references a second operation.

endings.title: Compromised Truth
endings.summary: Player choices preserve stability by accepting manipulated facts.
endings.epilogue: Case status becomes classified and public narrative diverges from internal logs.
endings.sequelHook: An antagonist fragment congratulates your efficiency.

endings.title: Psychological Break
endings.summary: Contradictions remain unresolved and trust collapses across all channels.
endings.epilogue: Your board is complete but no version of events can be proven cleanly.
endings.sequelHook: A mirrored transcript appears using your own phrasing.

timeline.summary: An intake anomaly lands across multiple channels before dawn.
Metadata drift appears between duplicate files and erodes confidence.
A witness account conflicts with dispatch timing by exactly nine minutes.
A dead account sends a fresh attachment with current geotag residue.
Administrative records reveal prior attempts to bury this case.
Evidence custody breaks for twenty-two minutes and no one logs it.
The first branch point forces trust in a source you cannot verify.
Friendly channels begin echoing antagonist phrasing.
Recovered logs contain one corrected timestamp that changes motive.
A journalist leak points to an internal collaborator.
One evidence image contains a planted anomaly meant to bait fast conclusions.
Unknown contact sends a warning that names your previous choice.
A voicemail includes background audio from a location not yet disclosed.
Second branch point determines whether public pressure or covert trace is prioritized.
Direct interference interrupts calls and reroutes message threads.
A witness goes dark after confirming a hidden ledger.
Emergency dispatch references your alias instead of your legal profile.
An antagonist demand threatens collateral unless evidence is withheld.
A forged report nearly redirects the task force toward the wrong target.
Unknown contact reveals personal detail only the player would recognize.
Third branch point locks either protective extraction or aggressive exposure.
Cross-day clue map finally exposes the suppression mechanism.
Recovered recordings reveal contradiction between public narrative and private orders.
A trusted NPC admits one strategic lie and requests off-record forgiveness.
The antagonist offers a final pact framed as damage control.
Evidence board converges, but one key artifact remains unreliable.
Final puzzle forces interpretation of mutually exclusive truths.
Resolution day decides justice, compromise, corruption, or psychological fracture.

playerBriefing.recruitmentReason: You were selected because your prior casework identified contradiction patterns others ignored.
playerBriefing.openingIncident: At 02:17 local, synchronized drops across four channels triggered this investigation.
playerBriefing.personalStakes: The Creditor has begun adapting communications to your decisions.
playerBriefing.firstDirective: Verify evidence chain before any public move and protect vulnerable contacts.

weeks.label: Discovery & Curiosity
weeks.objective: Validate the first anomaly, establish trust baselines, and seed investigative obsession.

weeks.label: Escalation & Unease
weeks.objective: Push contradictions, introduce manipulative pressure, and degrade certainty.

weeks.label: Danger & Direct Involvement
weeks.objective: Force personal risk, urgent tradeoffs, and irreversible consequences.

weeks.label: Resolution or Psychological Break
weeks.objective: Collapse competing truths into final judgement, compromise, or breakdown.

npcDossiers.notableSecret: Canon Archivist Elara Voss can expose black-chapel-ledger-clue-pressure at high trust.
Bell Keeper Tomas Grell can expose black-chapel-ledger-clue-reveal at high trust.
Choir Witness Sera March can expose black-chapel-ledger-clue-origin at high trust.
Debt Broker Cal Dorn can expose black-chapel-ledger-clue-pressure at high trust.
Accepted leaked material from a source linked to the antagonist.

motivations: Force players to choose who deserves absolution.
npcDossiers.notableSecret: Has direct access to at least one internal evidence channel.
Identity intersects with official case administration records.
